title: Everything LuckyBlock
description: All original items can be obtained, including basic rocks as well as some other items that are otherwise inaccessible.（所有原版本物品均可提供、包括基岩以及一些无法获得的物品。）
body:
## 更多结果的幸运方块

This mod can generate all items from the original version, including air blocks, bedrock, and so on.
此模组能够生成原版中的所有物品，包括空气方块、岩石等

It offers a variety of sets and provides some equipment that cannot be enchanted in the original version
它提供了多种套装，并提供了在原版中无法附魔的某些装备。

Of course, to make the game more interesting, there are various structures and events that can occur.
当然，为了让游戏更具趣味性，还会出现各种各样的建筑和事件


PS: Of course, there are also very powerful monsters wearing some powerful equipment.
注：当然，还有一些非常强大的怪物身披着一些强大的装备。

The synthesis formula is created by combining quartz and gold particles.
合成配方是通过将石英和金颗合成。


后续会添加更多有趣的事件、以及结构等。
假如你有好玩的建议请联系邮箱： **wangsir777@yeah.net **
我们一起交流
